role_summary: responsible for accurate, timely, and compliant financial reporting in line with statutory and  accounting standards.
responsibilities: • prepare financial  statements as per ind as / ifrs   • ensure accurate consolidation and disclosures   • coordinate with auditors during audits   • maintain reporting calendars and compliance timelines   • analyze financial performance and trends   • support management reporting and decision -making
qualifications: • ca qualification   • strong financial reporting and accounting standards knowledge   • high attention to detail   • advanced excel and reporting tools proficiency
